steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage says a few fictitious entries — invented, made-up things perpetrated as hoaxes — persisted until they were finally recognized as ______ and deleted. The blank needs a word that names what these entries fundamentally were: invented falsehoods.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• "fabrications": “Fabrications” means invented falsehoods. The passage already calls these entries “fictitious” and “hoaxes” — fabrications is the precise label. ✓
  • "analyses": “Analyses” means detailed examinations. A fake entry about a nonexistent town is not an analysis of anything. ✗
  • "revelations": “Revelations” means surprising disclosures of truth. These entries were lies, not truths being revealed — opposite meaning. ✗
  • "enhancements": “Enhancements” means improvements. Adding false information is not improving Wikipedia. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
